_publications._publicationTitle: Hybrid Minigene Assay: An Efficient Tool to Characterize mRNA Splicing Profiles of

_contextSnippet: the wild-type mRNA, which represents approximately 11% of the total transcripts...residual wild-type mRNA (approximately 3% of the total)...correctly spliced transcript (that reaches 69% of total mRNA)
details: Successfully expressed NF1 variants and controls, allowing detection of splicing patterns including residual wild-type transcript production (11% for c.1722-3C > T, 3% for c.3496 + 5, 69% for c.4538_4540delGAC)
